summary: Iteration 8 fully validated. New 'credible_top5' strategy end-to-end: POST /api/grids/generate {strategy:'credible_top5'} returns pool_size=10, exactly 5 grids sorted by score desc, each grid has {numbers,chance,score,sum,evens,strategy='credible_top5'}, credibility_stats.hist_sum_mean=124.7 (real FDJ 1048 draws), hist_even_mean≈2.44. Sample avg grid sum stays within 40 of hist mean. Regression: hot/cold/balanced/weighted_random still return count grids with correct strategy field; unknown strategy → 422; 'credible_top5' literal accepted (no 422). Draws limit: default returns 500, ?limit=1500 returns all 1048. Frontend /dashboard/generator: 5 strategy cards visible, 'Top 5 crédibles' violet with 'RECOMMANDÉ' badge and default-selected; count buttons hidden with credible_top5 (info text '10 candidates générés · scoring crédibilité · top 5 retournés' shown) and appear when other strategies selected. Générer with credible_top5 shows violet 'Scoring de crédibilité' meta card + 5 grid cards each with Crédibilité % (e.g. 77.6%). Switching to 'hot' + Générer shows 3 plain grids without credibility card/percent. Overview page displays 1048 (limit fix confirmed).
passed: POST /grids/generate credible_top5 → 200, pool_size=10, 5 grids sorted score desc, hist_sum_mean≈124.7, hist_even_mean≈2.4
Each credible_top5 grid: numbers(5,1-49), chance(1-10), sum,evens,score,strategy fields present and consistent
Sample grid sums stay within 40 of historical mean (scoring bias evidence)
Regression: hot/cold/balanced/weighted_random return correct count and strategy label
Frontend: 5 strategy cards render with data-testid=strategy-{key}; RECOMMANDÉ badge on credible_top5
Frontend: default strategy=credible_top5, count buttons hidden, info text shown
Frontend: clicking 'hot' shows count buttons; clicking 'credible_top5' hides them again
Frontend: Générer with credible_top5 → 5 generated-grid-* cards + credibility-meta card + Crédibilité % per grid (77.6% etc.)
Frontend: Générer with hot → 3 grids, no credibility-meta, no % shown
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1403 lines — still monolithic. Splitting /grids, /draws, /stats routers into separate modules recommended (deferred from iter 6/7).
credible_top5 branch uses local 'import math' inside the endpoint — move to module-level imports.
GET /draws hard-caps at limit param with no server-side ceiling; frontend passes 1500 which is fine today, but consider enforcing max_limit=2000 on backend to prevent accidental huge fetches.
credible_top5 candidate loop caps at POOL_SIZE*4=40 attempts to dedupe — with 1048 draws this is safe; document the fallback (may return <10 candidates in pathological cases).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 credible_top5 strategy + /draws limit fix fully pass. Reuse test_iter8.py for regression. Note that inner_text on the Crédibilité label reads as 'CRÉDIBILITÉ' due to CSS tracking-widest uppercasing — the % value is what matters (score*100 rounded to 1 decimal).
